title: El valor oculto de los residuos del sector agroalimentario
subtitle: ¡Hagamosla girar!
description: An EU-funded project presenting innovative valorization routes for recycling agro-food sector residues and fostering a circular economy. It covers high-yield extraction of pure bioactives for food, cosmetic and nutraceutical formulations, multilayer plastic recycling solutions, and a digital traceability platform powered by machine learning.
